calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday 22, 2015 in Department 525:
Lin Xia and Ying Long, Respondents/Plaintiffs are present as propria persona.
Hanzhong su, Hanzhong Su, & Mary Ma, Appellants/Defendants are present as Propria Persona Court assigned Mandarin interpreter Edward Chu for Appellants/Defendants.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent Lin Xia testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits Not Marked - signed lease, sublease advertisment, & lease agreement
Respondent Ying Long testifies on her own behalf.

Guangyuan Su testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit Not Marked - letter of the agreement to landlord and signed lease.
Parties respond to Judge Grotch's questions.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Jean Kong; Matters Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
